item.description: High quality wallpaper: A lone, stoic Samurai in a clean, black streetwear kimono, standing with his back to the viewer in the lower 30% of the frame. He holds a katana loosely at his side. The background is a deep, matte indigo solid color. Above him, in the vast negative space, the Japanese Zen proverb "The mind is everything. What you think you become." is rendered in an elegant, thin serif font, pure white. , masterpiece, 8k resolution, minimalist poster design, crisp typography, clean solid background, flawless text rendering, vector art style, negative space
